summary: Completed comprehensive testing of P0-A (deletion-safe document numbering) and P1-C (multi-level approval) features. All backend APIs and frontend UI components working correctly.

design_issues.issue: Console warning: 'Encountered two children with the same key, prod_batik_mega-wh_jakarta'
design_issues.impact: No functional impact, but should be fixed for code quality

passed_tests: Authentication: Admin and Manager login successful
P0-A: PO number generation uses max-based approach (PO-00012 generated correctly after PO-00011)
P0-A: SO number listing works correctly
P1-C Backend: Manager approved PO-00010 L1 → status stays 'waiting_approval', moves to L2 admin
P1-C Backend: Manager cannot approve PO-00010 L2 (403 - needs admin role)
P1-C Backend: Admin approved PO-00010 L2 → fully approved, status 'pending', inbound tasks created
P1-C Backend: Manager cannot approve PO-00011 (403 - needs admin role)
P1-C Backend: Admin approved PO-00011 → fully approved
P1-C Backend SoD: Manager cannot approve their own PO (403 - Segregation of Duties)
P1-C Frontend: Approval Pembelian page loads correctly
P1-C Frontend: 'Menunggu' tab shows waiting POs (PO-00007, PO-00013)
P1-C Frontend: PO-00007 displays approval level 'MANAGER - Tingkat 1 dari 1'
P1-C Frontend: PO-00007 expands to show approval chain stepper
P1-C Frontend: Admin can see approve button for PO-00007
P1-C Frontend: 'Disetujui' tab shows approved POs (PO-00010, PO-00011)
P1-C Frontend: PO-00010 shows 2-level approval chain with both L1 (Manager) and L2 (Direksi) approved
P1-C Frontend: Approval chain displays approver names and dates correctly
P1-C Frontend: Manager can access Approval Pembelian page

p0a_deletion_safe_numbering.details: Document numbering uses max-based approach correctly. Tested with PO creation - generated PO-00012 after existing PO-00011, proving deletion-safe implementation.

p1c_multi_level_approval_backend.details: Multi-level approval chain working correctly. PO-00010 (2 levels) tested: Manager approved L1, Admin approved L2. Approval chain state transitions correctly, inbound tasks created after full approval.

p1c_segregation_of_duties.details: SoD enforcement working. Manager who created PO-00013 received 403 when attempting to approve their own PO.

p1c_frontend_ui.details: Frontend displays approval chain correctly with stepper UI showing L1/L2 badges, status (Disetujui/Menunggu), approver names, and dates. 'Tingkat X dari Y' progress indicator working.

notes: Backend testing completed with 100% success rate (13/13 tests)
Frontend UI correctly displays multi-level approval chains with stepper visualization
Role-aware buttons working (admin sees approve buttons, manager sees locked state for admin-level approvals)
Approval chain shows correct status badges and approver information
Minor console warning about duplicate React keys (no functional impact)
